text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day has finally come for me to give my
presentation in front of the other trainers.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Time for our regular trainers' meeting. I'm looking
forward to your presentation,
<username>!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I may not be as good as the veteran trainers, but
I've learned how to put in hard work through all
my strength training, and I'm determined to do
my best!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: So... how did it go?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Really?! That's fantastic! What a relief to hear
that.
choice_data_list:
I invited you out today in order to give you my
thanks.

I invited you out today in order to give you my
thanks.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: That's not necessary! I didn't do anything special.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I basically just gave you unsolicited advice out of
nowhere... And all because I saw myself in you.
choice_data_list: You saw yourself in me? How?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's just... I went through the same thing
once...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I've always enjoyed being active, ever since I was
little. That's what got me into working out at first.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Then one day, my aunt told me I was really
well-built for running.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty plain and unremarkable for a Mejiro,
but then I realized there was still something that
set me apart too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
My musculature was my strength, and I was
determined to make it my weapon!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: So, I started working out even harder. However...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
"I have to lift this much, or else! I... I have to train
more!"

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
One day, I hit a wall and went into a full-blown
panic. I threw myself headlong into training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I even started forgoing sleep for the sake of
training. Eventually, everyone stopped me. And
then...

text_block_list.name: Grandma Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
I heard from Ardan that you've been exercising
yourself sick.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: That's not true! I'm just trying to get stronger so—

text_block_list.name: Grandma Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
You cannot cross a thousand miles in a single
bound.

text_block_list.name: Grandma Mejiro
text_block_list.text: That goes for anyone, even McQueen and Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Grandma Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
Ryan... Recognize the value in every step you
take.

text_block_list.name: Grandma Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
No matter how small the step you take is, it is still
a step forward.

text_block_list.name: Grandma Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
The barbells you've been lifting are heavier than
the ones you used last year, no?

text_block_list.name: Grandma Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
You have come to personify those very barbells.
It's why we expect so much of you. Do not forget
that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
We all tend to focus on making big
transformations and gaining huge success.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: But what's really important...
choice_data_list: Is the daily progress you make, right?
Is the daily progress you make, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Right! So long as you do a little every day, there's
nothing you can't achieve!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: That's why I really wanted you to realize...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Just how amazing strength training is!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure it was strength training that taught
me the importance of working hard every day,
not the other way around, but oh well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure it was strength training that taught
me the importance of working hard every day,
not the other way around, but oh well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: What?! Me? A good presenter?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You're kidding! That's, like, the last thing I'm
good at! I hate standing in front of people and
trying to explain ideas.
choice_data_list:
I bet you'd be good at strength training
lectures.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...Strength training lectures!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That actually sounds kinda fun... Want to help me
practice doing presentations, then?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time later, I accompany her for her
presentation practice and further increase my
knowledge on working out.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I knew you'd understand me, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
By the way, I've been thinking up a workout
routine just for you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I put together this routine for you catered to your
habits and commonly used muscles, which I
gleaned from observing your training!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You focused on training your upper body last
time, so this routine targets your lower half,
especially your thighs and...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She continues waxing poetic over the regimen
she's put together for a long, long time.
